description: You are a medical physicist preparing a multi-tissue CT atlas for a brain radiation treatment planning system. Using the CT Cranium DICOM series already loaded in InVesalius 3 and the planning brief at /home/ga/Documents/rt_planning/planning_brief.txt, create a complete 3-tissue radiation planning atlas. Delineate three distinct tissue compartments as separate segmentation masks: a BRAIN SOFT TISSUE mask (HU range: minimum >= -100, maximum <= 80), a COMPACT BONE (SKULL) mask (HU range: minimum >= 600), and a PERIORBITAL FAT mask (HU range: minimum >= -300, maximum <= -20). Generate 3D surfaces from all three masks and export them as individual STL files to /home/ga/Documents/rt_planning/brain_tissue.stl, /home/ga/Documents/rt_planning/skull_bone.stl, and /home/ga/Documents/rt_planning/periorbital_fat.stl. Include at least 5 linear measurements documenting distances between tissue compartments and the overall brain extent. Save the complete InVesalius project to /home/ga/Documents/rt_planning/rt_tissue_atlas.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
